official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and the container_set_slot packet id.
Official binary source for constructing, writing, reading, and observing the container_set_slot body.
Official binary source for writing and dispatch-decoding the full Play clientbound container_set_slot frame.

field_notes.container_id: Uses the official RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.writeContainerId/readContainerId surface with a small non-zero container id.
field_notes.state_id: Uses the official RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.writeVarInt/readVarInt surface with a small non-zero state id.
field_notes.slot: Uses the official RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.writeShort/readShort surface with a small non-zero slot.
field_notes.item_stack: Uses the official ItemStack.EMPTY fixture, so ItemStack.OPTIONAL_STREAM_CODEC emits the empty-stack marker without an item registry entry or component payload.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound container_set_slot packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official empty ItemStack fixture only; do not infer non-empty ItemStack/component registry handling, menu lifecycle behavior, inventory state, initialized game state, runtime Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
